name: Chicken & Rice Casserole
recipeIngredient: 10 3/4 oz Canned Condensed Cream Of Celery Soup
2 Chicken Breasts Halves, Skinned and Boned
1/2 Cup Raw Long Grain Converted Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the soup, mushrooms, and rice in a well-greased slow cooker.
2. Stir well.
3. Lay the chicken breasts on top of the mixture.
4. Sprinkle the onion soup mix over.
5. Cover.
6. Cook on LOW for 7 to 9 hours.
7. Serve hot.
